$comment: AI-mode model catalog for the RTX 5090 / Ryzen 9 9950X3D / 64GB DDR5 build (32GB VRAM 'max' tier). Maps the user's use-case menu to concrete models. Text + vision LLMs run in Ollama (OpenAI-compatible server on :11434); image-generation models run in ComfyUI (separate, port 8188 — Ollama has no diffusion on Linux). Each 'repo' is an exact ollama.com tag (pinned, never ':latest'); tags verified 2026-07-16. 70B models (~43GB Q4) do NOT fit 32GB VRAM — they are 'heavy' offload options, never the default. Larger tiers (see docs/website-configurator-design.md) scale this catalog by VRAM.

server.note: Ollama's OpenAI-compatible server on :11434 (native REST also at /api/*); the existing thin clients (distro-ai-ask/overlay/nautilus) target it unchanged.

qwen2.5-coder-32b.name: Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct
qwen2.5-coder-32b.note: Best coding/CAD model; fits fully in 32GB VRAM with large context headroom.

qwen3-32b.name: Qwen3-32B (reasoning)
qwen3-32b.note: Best day-to-day model that fits 32GB fully.

qwen2.5-14b.name: Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct
qwen2.5-14b.note: Balanced day-to-day; fits fully with huge context headroom.

llama3.3-70b.name: Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct
llama3.3-70b.note: Q4_K_M ~42.5GB EXCEEDS 32GB VRAM — Ollama auto-offloads the overflow layers to the 64GB DDR5. Realistic ~6-12 tok/s. A 'heavy' option, not the default.

deepseek-r1-70b.name: DeepSeek-R1 70B (distill, reasoning)
deepseek-r1-70b.note: ~43GB EXCEEDS 32GB VRAM — Ollama offloads overflow layers to system RAM (slow). 'heavy' know-it-all only.

dolphin-mixtral-8x7b.name: Dolphin 2.7 Mixtral 8x7B (uncensored MoE)
dolphin-mixtral-8x7b.note: Right at the edge of 32GB VRAM — keep context modest or it spills to RAM.

dolphin3-8b.name: Dolphin 3.0 (Llama-3.1) 8B (uncensored)
dolphin3-8b.note: Fast uncensored alt to the Mixtral MoE.

qwen3-30b-a3b.name: Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct (MoE)
qwen3-30b-a3b.note: 30B MoE (~3B active) — a capable desktop assistant that stays fast and fits 32GB.

qwen2.5vl-32b.name: Qwen2.5-VL-32B-Instruct (vision)
qwen2.5vl-32b.note: ollama pulls the vision projector with the tag; ~21GB fits 32GB.

flux1-dev.name: FLUX.1-dev
flux1-dev.note: Best image gen. GATED on HF (accept license + token). Runs in ComfyUI, NOT Ollama. Default install uses the no-token FLUX.1-schnell instead unless you provide HF_TOKEN.

sdxl.name: Stable Diffusion XL base 1.0
sdxl.note: Fast image gen, no token. Runs in ComfyUI.
